meta.description: Receives a Slack interaction (message shortcut 'Add to the Brain' modal submit, or a :brain: reaction), verifies the Slack request signature, normalizes it into the m2 _inbox schema (source: slack), and writes _inbox/slack-<ts>.md to the Brain repo via the GitHub Contents API. That push fires m3's ingest.yml. Non-technical feeding channel of Brain. Reuses m5's meet-to-inbox skeleton + GitHub credential. Host: Railway. See integrations/slack/README.md. Keep the Code node in lock-step with integrations/n8n/slack-normalize.js (its test guards the contract).
